summary: Iter21 — Verified tip → BetterSocial gift-DM feature. All 5 checks passed via 4 pytest tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter21_gift_dm.py (Test 5 regression assertions were folded into test_1 since it needs the same tip send). Sender balance debited, recipient credited, public shoutbox announcement present, private BetterSocial DM created with correct 'kind=tip_notification' and text including '🎁 Gift from user @testbugfix1 : $2.00' + note. Tip-without-note produces exact text with no 'Note:' line. BetterSocial user exists exactly once and cannot log in with '!disabled' password (returns 400).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3891 lines — should be modularised (tips, spin, 5sim, wallet etc.) into separate routers for maintainability.

_get_or_create_system_bot has a small race condition — concurrent first tips could create two BetterSocial rows. Recommend a unique index on users.username or use find_one_and_update with upsert + $setOnInsert.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use existing users. Tips are additive; recipient balance/unread grows across runs but assertions use pre/post deltas.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet balance endpoint is /api/client/balance (returns {balance, withdrawable}). Public shoutbox is /api/public-chat/messages. DM thread key uses messaging._pair_key (sorted UUIDs joined by '::'). BetterSocial system bot id is fetched via db.users.find_one({username:'BetterSocial'}). DB_NAME=test_database.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; feature works as spec'd.
